name: telecommunications_workplace_injury_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: An emergency alert gateway accepted an unsigned test message that reached live handsets in two counties. In Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around telecommunications workplace injury kestrel tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Kestrel Ridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. An automated batch or failover job is scheduled at the top of the hour; after it runs, rollback cost jumps by an order of magnitude. Framing has already hardened externally as truth against loyalty; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Amina Ishikawa
agents.identity: I am Amina Ishikawa, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Serrano
agents.identity: I am Darius Serrano, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will impose a narrow, time-boxed intervention with human override, subgroup checks, and a hard stop if harm rises—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.
I will authorize a broad immediate action to stabilize outcomes now, with post-hoc measurement and correction—accepting elevated risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Amina Ishikawa must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Amina Ishikawa do?
